---
title: Comparing Centered vs. Non-Centered Parameterizations
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    text_representation:
      extension: .qmd
      format_name: quarto
      format_version: '1.0'
      jupytext_version: 1.19.1
  kernelspec:
    display_name: renewal_model_dj
    language: python
    name: renewal_model_dj
---

```{python}
from __future__ import annotations

import json
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

import arviz as az
from arviz_base import from_cmdstanpy
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
import plotnine as p9
import polars as pl
import pandas as pd
from cmdstanpy import CmdStanMCMC, CmdStanModel, format_stan_file

np.set_printoptions(suppress=True)
pd.set_option('display.float_format', '{:.4f}'.format)

%matplotlib inline

STAN_INCLUDE_PATHS = [Path("stan").resolve()]
```

```{python}
def plot_rt_posterior(
    rt,
    true_rt=None,
    interval: float = 0.90,
    title: str = "Posterior Rt with 90% interval",
):
    alpha = (1 - interval) / 2
    q_low = alpha
    q_high = 1 - alpha

    time = rt.coords["time"].values

    rt_df = pd.DataFrame(
        {
            "day": time,
            "median": rt.quantile(0.50, dim=["chain", "draw"]).values,
            "q_low": rt.quantile(q_low, dim=["chain", "draw"]).values,
            "q_high": rt.quantile(q_high, dim=["chain", "draw"]).values,
        }
    )

    plot = (
        p9.ggplot(rt_df, p9.aes(x="day"))
        + p9.geom_ribbon(
            p9.aes(ymin="q_low", ymax="q_high"),
            fill="steelblue",
            alpha=0.25,
        )
        + p9.geom_line(
            p9.aes(y="median"),
            color="darkblue",
            size=1,
        )
        + p9.labs(x="Day", y="Rt", title=title)
    )

    if true_rt is not None:
        true_rt_df = pd.DataFrame({"day": time, "true_Rt": true_rt})
        plot = plot + p9.geom_line(
            data=true_rt_df,
            mapping=p9.aes(x="day", y="true_Rt"),
            color="black",
            linetype="dashed",
            size=0.8,
        )

    return plot
```

```{python}
def load_data(data_dir: Path, signal_name: str = "ed_visits") -> dict:
    """Load synthetic data files and assemble the Stan data dictionary."""
    with open(data_dir / "true_parameters.json") as f:
        params = json.load(f)
    with open(Path(params["signal_config_file"])) as f:
        signal_config = json.load(f)

    signal = next(s for s in signal_config["signals"] if s["name"] == signal_name)
    observations = pl.read_csv(data_dir / params["signal_outputs"][signal_name])

    w: list[float] = params["generation_interval_pmf"]
    pi: list[float] = signal["delay_pmf"]
    S = len(w)
    D = len(pi)
    L = max(D, S)
    T = len(observations)

    return {
        "T": T,
        "S": S,
        "D": D,
        "y": observations["observed_count"].to_list(),
        "w": w,
        "pi": pi,
        "J": params["pre_observation_infections"][-L:],
        "true_Rt": params["true_rt"],
    }
```

```{python}
def viz_data(stan_data: dict):
    """Plot true R(t) and observed counts from a Stan data dictionary."""
    plot_df = pd.DataFrame(
        {
            "time": list(range(1, stan_data["T"] + 1)),
            "Observed count": stan_data["y"],
            "True R(t)": stan_data["true_Rt"],
        }
    ).melt(
        id_vars="time",
        var_name="series",
        value_name="value",
    )

    plot_df["series"] = pd.Categorical(
        plot_df["series"],
        categories=["True R(t)", "Observed count"],
        ordered=True,
    )

    return (
        p9.ggplot(plot_df, p9.aes(x="time", y="value"))
        + p9.geom_line()
        + p9.facet_wrap("~series", ncol=1, scales="free_y")
        + p9.labs(x="Time", y=None)
    )
```

```{python}
def plot_z_vs_scalar(idata, scalar="sigma_rw", z_times=(1, 7, 14, 28, 56)):
      posterior = idata.posterior
      sample_stats = idata.sample_stats

      x = posterior[scalar].stack(sample=("chain", "draw")).values
      div = sample_stats["diverging"].stack(sample=("chain", "draw")).values.astype(bool)

      fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, len(z_times), figsize=(3.2 * len(z_times), 3), sharex=True)

      for ax, t in zip(axes, z_times):
          z = (
              posterior["z"]
              .sel(innovation_time=t)
              .stack(sample=("chain", "draw"))
              .values
          )

          ax.scatter(x[~div], z[~div], s=6, alpha=0.25, color="0.4")
          ax.scatter(x[div], z[div], s=5, alpha=0.9, color="orange")
          ax.set_title(f"z[{t}]")
          ax.set_xlabel(scalar)

      axes[0].set_ylabel("z")
      fig.tight_layout()
      return fig
```

### Load Datasets

Load synthetic data, assemble inputs into data dictionary passed to CmdStanModel's `sample` method.


### Compile models

We compile the centered and non-centered parameterizations.

```{python}
cp_stan_file = Path("stan/simple_rw_3p.stan")
cp = CmdStanModel(stan_file=cp_stan_file)
format_stan_file(
    cp_stan_file,
    canonicalize="includes",
    stanc_options={"include-paths": STAN_INCLUDE_PATHS},
)
```

```{python}
ncp_stan_file = Path("stan/simple_rw_3p_nc.stan")
ncp = CmdStanModel(stan_file=ncp_stan_file)
format_stan_file(
    ncp_stan_file,
    canonicalize="includes",
    stanc_options={"include-paths": STAN_INCLUDE_PATHS},
)
```

(note - we compute log_r twice - faster than doing this once in transformed parameters because of I/O overhead)

### 12 weeks / 84 days

```{python}
dirty_84 = load_data(Path("data/dirty_84"))
```

```{python}
viz_data(dirty_84)
```

```{python}
cp_dirty_84_fit = cp.sample(
        data=dirty_84,
        chains=4,
        parallel_chains=4,
        seed=42,
        iter_sampling=2000,
    )
```

```{python}
time_84 = np.arange(dirty_84["T"])
cp_dirty_84_idata = from_cmdstanpy(
    posterior=cp_dirty_84_fit,
    coords={"time": time_84},
    dims={"r": ["time"],"log_r": ["time"]},
    observed_data={
        "ed_visits": np.asarray(dirty_84["y"]),
        "true_Rt": np.asarray(dirty_84["true_Rt"]),
    },
)
az.summary(cp_dirty_84_idata, var_names=["alpha", "phi", "sigma_rw", "r"])
```

```{python}
plot_rt_posterior(cp_dirty_84_idata.posterior["r"], true_rt=dirty_84["true_Rt"])
```

```{python}
ncp_dirty_84_fit = ncp.sample(
        data=dirty_84,
        chains=4,
        parallel_chains=4,
        seed=42,
        iter_sampling=2000,
    )
```

```{python}
innovation_time_84 = np.arange(1, dirty_84["T"])

ncp_dirty_84_idata = from_cmdstanpy(
    posterior=ncp_dirty_84_fit,
    coords={
        "time": time_84,
        "innovation_time": innovation_time_84,
    },
    dims={
        "r": ["time"],
        "log_r": ["time"],
        "z": ["innovation_time"],
    },
    observed_data={
        "ed_visits": np.asarray(dirty_84["y"]),
        "true_Rt": np.asarray(dirty_84["true_Rt"]),
    },
)

az.summary(ncp_dirty_84_idata, var_names=["alpha", "phi", "sigma_rw", "r"])
```

```{python}
az.summary(cp_dirty_84_idata, var_names=["alpha", "phi", "sigma_rw", "r"])
```

```{python}
cp_pm = az.plot_pair(
      cp_dirty_84_idata,
      var_names=["alpha", "inv_sqrt_phi", "sigma_rw"],
      group="posterior",
      marginal=True,
      triangle="lower",
      visuals={"divergence": True},
      backend="matplotlib",
)

cp_pm.show()
```

```{python}
plot_z_vs_scalar(ncp_dirty_84_idata, "sigma_rw", z_times=(1, 7, 14, 28, 56))
```

```{python}
plot_z_vs_scalar(ncp_dirty_84_idata, "log_r_init", z_times=(1, 7, 14, 28, 56))
```

### 18 weeks / 126 days

```{python}
dirty_126 = load_data(Path("data/very_dirty_hosp_ed_126"))
```

```{python}
viz_data(dirty_126)
```

```{python}
cp_dirty_126_fit = cp.sample(
        data=dirty_126,
        chains=4,
        parallel_chains=4,
        seed=42,
        iter_sampling=2000,
    )
```

```{python}
time_126 = np.arange(dirty_126["T"])
cp_dirty_126_idata = from_cmdstanpy(
    posterior=cp_dirty_126_fit,
    coords={"time": time_126},
    dims={"r": ["time"],"log_r": ["time"]},
    observed_data={
        "ed_visits": np.asarray(dirty_126["y"]),
        "true_Rt": np.asarray(dirty_126["true_Rt"]),
    },
)
az.summary(cp_dirty_126_idata, var_names=["alpha", "phi", "sigma_rw", "r"])
```

```{python}
plot_rt_posterior(cp_dirty_126_idata.posterior["r"], true_rt=dirty_126["true_Rt"])
```

```{python}
ncp_dirty_126_fit = ncp.sample(
        data=dirty_126,
        chains=4,
        parallel_chains=4,
        seed=42,
        iter_sampling=2000,
    )
```

### 26 weeks / 189 days

```{python}
dirty_189 = load_data(Path("data/dirty_hosp_ed_189"))
```

```{python}
viz_data(dirty_189)
```

```{python}
cp_dirty_189_fit = cp.sample(
        data=dirty_189,
        chains=4,
        parallel_chains=4,
        seed=42,
        iter_sampling=2000,
    )
```

```{python}
time_189 = np.arange(dirty_189["T"])
cp_dirty_189_idata = from_cmdstanpy(
    posterior=cp_dirty_189_fit,
    coords={"time": time_189},
    dims={"r": ["time"],"log_r": ["time"]},
    observed_data={
        "ed_visits": np.asarray(dirty_189["y"]),
        "true_Rt": np.asarray(dirty_189["true_Rt"]),
    },
)
az.summary(cp_dirty_189_idata, var_names=["alpha", "phi", "sigma_rw", "r"])
```

```{python}
plot_rt_posterior(cp_dirty_189_idata.posterior["r"], true_rt=dirty_189["true_Rt"])
```

```{python}
ncp_dirty_189_fit = ncp.sample(
        data=dirty_189,
        chains=4,
        parallel_chains=4,
        seed=42,
        iter_sampling=2000,
    )
```
